name: Spicy Beef Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1 Hot chili pepper (canned, seeded and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion, green pepper, celery, garlic, and ground beef together until the beef is brown. Drain excess fat.
2. Add curry powder and saute for 5 more minutes.
3. Stir in seasoned salt, pepper, thyme, tomato paste, olives, and hot chili pepper.
4. Simmer the mixture, covered, for 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
5. Cool the meat filling completely.
6. Melt butter over low heat.
7. Unroll phyllo dough and cut into 1-1/2 inch strips. Keep the dough under a damp towel to prevent it from drying out.
8. Take one piece of dough at a time, brush with melted butter, and place a teaspoonful of meat mixture at the end of the strip.
9. Fold the corner over and continue folding until you retain a triangular shape. Brush the outside of the triangle with butter.
10. Repeat these steps with the remaining dough and filling.
11. Chill the puffs for one hour or more, covered with plastic wrap.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
These puffs are quite spicy and pair well with drinks. They serve approximately 12 people.
